label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7

extraction.one_line_summary: HERRADA Jesús won from a six-rider breakaway after TREK-Segafredo failed to drop sprinters on the mid-stage mountain, allowing the break to survive with a tailwind finish.
tactical_patterns: TREK-Segafredo hammered the climb to drop sprinters but failed when BENNETT's teammates paced him over, wasting energy.
Six-rider break survived because teams abandoned chase after realizing tailwind on 50km descent favored escapees despite 2:28 gap.
BENNETT still gained sprint points despite TREK's attack plan, showing minor placings matter when breakaway success is certain.

rider_signals.HERRADA Jesús: positive: Won from breakaway with perfectly timed throw after long high-pace day showed superior freshness management
rider_signals.BATTISTELLA Samuele: neutral: Led out sprint but ran out of power in final meters, suggests strong but not elite finishing speed
rider_signals.WRIGHT Fred: positive: Third place finish continues string of strong breakaway results, demonstrating consistent opportunism
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: Survived TREK's mountain attack with team support and won field sprint, proving resilience under targeted pressure
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: TREK's plan to drop sprinters on climb backfired completely, leaving PEDERSEN losing sprint points despite team effort
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: Retained red jersey but 21-second gap to MOLARD suggests vulnerability before weekend mountain stages
rider_signals.JANSSENS Jimmy: neutral: Attacked first from break showing ambition but lacked finishing power to contest sprint
